server.name: quant-agentic-mcp
server.description: MCP server for quant-agentic-trading-core. Exposes ledger state, HMM market regime, and emergency circuit breaker.

tools.name: get_ledger_state
tools.description: Reads active positions, capital allocation, and available capital from the SQLite ledger.

tools.name: set_execution_mode
tools.description: Changes the execution mode: REPLAY, PAPER, SHADOW, or PROD.

mode.description: Execution mode: REPLAY, PAPER, SHADOW, or PROD

tools.name: get_execution_mode
tools.description: Returns the current execution mode: REPLAY, PAPER, SHADOW, or PROD.

tools.name: get_paper_positions
tools.description: Returns all open paper trading positions from the virtual ledger.

tools.name: get_performance_summary
tools.description: Returns aggregated PnL metrics (win rate, profit factor, avg win/loss) for a given execution mode.

tools.name: get_pnl_history
tools.description: Returns historical closed trade performance data with PnL details.

tools.name: get_closed_paper_positions
tools.description: Returns closed paper trading positions with PnL results from the virtual ledger.

tools.name: get_market_regime
tools.description: Queries the live HMM filter status, regime label, and Dissimilarity Index for OOD detection.

returns_json.description: Optional JSON-encoded array of recent returns for live inference

tools.name: get_arbitrage_opportunities
tools.description: Returns current arbitrage opportunities detected by ArbitrageScanner.

tools.name: get_friction_model
tools.description: Returns the current execution friction cost per contract used in backtest validation.

tools.name: lobstar_submit_signal
tools.description: Bridge for LOBSTAR semantic agent: accepts a parsed signal dict and routes it through typing validation before execution.

tools.name: get_feature_store_stats
tools.description: Returns row counts for each table in the DuckDB feature store.

tools.name: get_feature_history
tools.description: Returns historical feature values for a given ticker and feature name.

tools.name: list_ai_specialists
tools.description: Returns specialized AI roles for targeted low-token project improvement tasks.

task.description: Optional task filter, e.g. security, execution, provider

tools.name: get_ai_specialist
tools.description: Returns one AI specialist contract with priority files, provider policy, and output contract.

tools.name: get_project_prompt_context
tools.description: Returns compact project context plus persistent memory for low-token prompts.

component.description: Optional component filter for project memory

tools.name: record_project_memory
tools.description: Records a compact project memory entry for future prompts. Do not store secrets or raw private data.

tools.name: scan_polymarket
tools.description: Scans Polymarket predictive markets for sentiment analysis and activity levels.

tools.name: calculate_kelly_size
tools.description: Computes recommended position sizing based on trade confidence, asset price, and current volatility regime.

tools.name: run_swarm_backtest
tools.description: Orchestrates multi-agent backtesting scenarios on historical quantitative assets.

tools.name: find_arbitrage_opportunities
tools.description: Finds crypto and prediction market arbitrage opportunities with high implied spreads.

tools.name: calculate_market_making_spreads
tools.description: Calculates skew-adjusted bid and ask quotes for prediction market order-books.

tools.name: search_brave_web
tools.description: Executes external web search via Brave API to gather recent market consensus and context.

tools.name: get_continuous_improvement_report
tools.description: Generates a consolidated code quality audit, test gap analysis, and self-improvement suggestions report.

tools.name: emergency_circuit_breaker
tools.description: Instantly freezes or unfreezes all outbound trading operations. Action must be 'ENGAGE' or 'DISENGAGE'.

action.description: ENGAGE to freeze trading, DISENGAGE to resume

tools.name: vol_surface_status
tools.description: Returns the status of the volatility surface module (SSVI models).

tools.name: vol_surface_synthetic
tools.description: Generates synthetic SSVI volatility surfaces for training or analysis.

tools.name: sentiment_ensemble
tools.description: Analyzes financial text sentiment using an ensemble of VADER + FinBERT.

tools.name: macro_taylor_rule
tools.description: Estimates implied central bank policy rate using Taylor Rule.

tools.name: macro_risk_assessment
tools.description: Assesses macro risk-on/risk-off regime using Taylor Rule + GDP + VIX.

tools.name: chart_detect_patterns
tools.description: Detects candlestick chart patterns (Head&Shoulders, Triangle, etc.) using YOLOv8.

tools.name: portfolio_optimize
tools.description: Optimizes portfolio weights using mean-variance, risk-parity, or equal-weight methods.

tools.name: hedge_simulate_rl
tools.description: Simulates option hedging using a DDPG reinforcement learning agent.

n_episodes.description: Number of episodes to simulate (default: 20, max: 30)

tools.name: earnings_sentiment_status
tools.description: Returns the status of the earnings sentiment pipeline.

tools.name: earnings_sentiment_analyze
tools.description: Analyzes earnings call transcript sentiment for a given ticker.

tools.name: backtest_run
tools.description: Runs a vectorized backtest on price/signal dataframes with cost model.

tools.name: feature_factory_compute
tools.description: Computes 40+ technical features from OHLCV data using FeatureFactory.

ohlcv_json.description: JSON-encoded OHLCV array with Open, High, Low, Close, Volume columns
